title: Supported attributes
excerpt: Review a complete list of attributes supported in Radar rules. > #### Use the Accounts v2 API to represent customers > The Accounts v2 API is generally available for Connect users, and in public preview for other Stripe users. If you’re part of the Accounts v2 preview, you need to specify a [specify a preview version](https://docs.stripe.com/api-v2-overview.md#sdk-and-api-versioning) in your code. > To request access to the Accounts v2 preview, > For most use cases, we recommend [modeling your customers as customer-configured Account objects](https://docs.stripe.com/accounts-v2/use-accounts-as-customers.md) instead of using [Customer](https://docs.stripe.com/api/customers.md) objects.…
